items.name: 屈斜路湖マリゴケ
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.name_en: Marimo Moss Balls of Lake Kussharo
en.description_en: This is a monument (natural monument) consisting of the marimo moss balls of Lake Kussharo. It is a town-designated cultural property of Teshikaga Town, designated on 1969-07-11.

items.name: 鐺別獅子舞
items.subcategory: 無形文化財（民俗/郷土芸能）

en.description_en: This is an intangible cultural property (folk performing art) consisting of the Tsukembetsu lion dance (shishimai). It is a town-designated cultural property of Teshikaga Town, designated on 1971-07-31.

items.name: 仁多獅子舞
items.subcategory: 無形文化財（民俗/郷土芸能）

en.description_en: This is an intangible cultural property (folk performing art) consisting of the Nita lion dance (shishimai). It is a town-designated cultural property of Teshikaga Town, designated on 1971-07-31.

items.name: 川湯ばやし
items.subcategory: 無形文化財（民俗/郷土芸能）

en.description_en: This is an intangible cultural property (folk performing art) consisting of the Kawayu festival music (bayashi). It is a town-designated cultural property of Teshikaga Town, designated on 2025-02-26.
